official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound keep_alive packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official keep_alive body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound keep_alive frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns keep_alive to packet id 0x2c.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the keep_alive id to ClientboundKeepAlivePacket.
The official keep_alive body is one big-endian long id.
The fixture uses a primitive constructor value, so it does not require initialized client/server state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove runtime keep-alive response behavior, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer runtime keep-alive response behavior, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
